description: Patch release: adds Hub init/login/logout/state, refreshes Hub workflow-state guidance, adds Hub spec-sync orchestration, and supports the Engineer terminal as an OpenCode-compatible platform.
changelog:
**Features:**
- feat(hub): add `suncode hub init`, `login`, `logout`, and `state`, using user-level Hub config plus login sessions keyed by `apiBaseUrl` instead of `SUNCODE_HUB_TOKEN`.
- feat(hooks): inject compact Hub state summaries into workflow-state context so agents can distinguish `hub:ok`, `not login`, `server error`, missing project config, and available Hub work without routing ordinary local work through Hub.
- feat(hub): add the Hub spec-sync orchestration skill and MinIO-backed spec sync helpers for task startup workflows.
- feat(engineer): add `suncode init --engineer` / `suncode uninstall --engineer` support, generating `.engineer/` OpenCode-compatible agents, commands, plugins, and shared Suncode helpers.

**Documentation:**
- docs: simplify README content and refresh Hub setup/configuration guidance in Chinese and English docs.

**Internal:**
- test: extend Hub, workflow-state, OpenCode-compatible template, and Engineer platform coverage.
notes:
No `--migrate` required.

Run `suncode update` after upgrading to receive refreshed Hub workflow-state hooks, Hub skill templates, and Engineer platform templates.

Install: `npm install -g @wjptz/suncode`
